MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Oren P. Noah, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Richard Hevener, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT IRWIN'S AUTOMOTIVE ENTERPRISES, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Irwin's Automotive Enterprises, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is denied and its alternate motion for summary adjudication is granted as to issues 3 (false representation) and 5 (punitive damages) and denied as to issues 1 (negligence), 2 (strict liability) and 4 (loss of consortium). The declarations of Terrance Hevener and Mr. Ay create a triable issue whether Richard Hevener was exposed to asbestos-containing Bendix brakes attributable to defendant. Because the Heveners were married prior to Mr. Hevener's suffered from an asbestos-related disease, the loss of consortium claimed is not barred due to the date of the marriage. Plaintiffs concede the lack of merit to their claims for false representation and punitive damages. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(220/HEK)
